attachment.urlInvalidScheme: Must start with http:// or https://

app.metaDescription: Capture knowledge. Connect decisions. Strengthen projects.

common.dashboardErrorBody: We apologize for the inconvenience. Please try again after a while. Contact your system administrator if the problem persists.
common.searchHint: Use the input above to filter

message.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete?
message.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action
message.knowledgeNotInProject: Knowledge is not associated with this project
message.creatorOrAdminOnlyDelete: Only the creator or an administrator can delete
message.fileFieldRequired: Specify a file in the 'file' field
message.requestBodyUnreadable: Failed to read the request body
message.noImportableTasks: No importable tasks. A header row plus one or more data rows is required
message.removeModeInvalid: removeMode must be one of keep / warn / delete
message.mfaSessionMismatch: Does not match the session user
message.mfaLockedDueToFailures: Locked out due to consecutive verification code failures
message.cannotChangeOwnRole: You cannot change your own role
message.userNotFoundOrDeleted: User not found (may have already been deleted)

auth.passwordHint: At least 10 characters with 3 or more of: uppercase, lowercase, digits, symbols
auth.accountLocked: Your account is locked. Please contact your administrator to unlock it.
auth.temporaryLock: Your account is temporarily locked due to repeated sign-in failures. Please try again after {unlockAt}.
auth.mfaCodeHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
auth.resetPasswordStep1Hint: Enter your email and recovery code
auth.passwordChangedRedirect: Password changed. Please sign in with your new password.
auth.setupSubtitle: Set your password to activate your account
auth.errorRetry: An error occurred. Please try again later.
auth.mfaRegisterFailed: Failed to register MFA. Please check the code and try again.
auth.recoveryCodeOnce: This code will not be shown again.
auth.mfaSecretManual: If you cannot scan the QR code (manual secret entry)
auth.tokenInvalidContact: Please contact your administrator to resend the invitation email.
auth.setupCompleteHint: Your account is now active. Please save the following recovery codes in a safe place.
auth.mfaSetupHint: System administrators are required to use multi-factor authentication (MFA). Scan the QR code below with an authenticator app (e.g., Google Authenticator) and enter the displayed 6-digit code to activate your account.
auth.mfaSetupNote: Note: You can return to this step from the same link as long as the token is valid (your password is already saved).

wbs.idToggleTooltip: For verifying ID consistency in CSV export/import
wbs.importDialogDescription: Edit the exported CSV file in Excel etc. and import it. Assignees and progress will be initialized.
wbs.createWorkPackageDescription: Create a structural node of the WBS. Effort and dates are aggregated automatically from child elements.
wbs.createActivityDescription: Register actual work. Please enter assignee, dates, and effort.
wbs.noMembersWarning: No members are registered. Please add members from Member Management first.
wbs.bulkEditDescription: Check the items to apply and enter values. Work Packages are excluded (only Activities will be updated).
wbs.bulkActualDescription: Check the items to apply and enter values. Work Packages are excluded (only Activities will be updated).
wbs.statusConsistencyHint: Status consistency rule: Not Started clears both actual start/end automatically; In Progress / On Hold clears actual end only; Completed retains both.
wbs.noTasks: No WBS tasks have been registered
wbs.noFilteredTasks: No tasks match the selected filters
wbs.editDescriptionBoth: You can update both edit fields and actual fields at the same time.
wbs.editDescriptionActual: Update actuals (status, progress rate, actual dates).
wbs.selectAtLeastOneField: Please select at least one field to update
wbs.idCopyHint: Click to select all (Ctrl+C to copy)

syncImport.title: WBS Overwrite Import
syncImport.description: Load a CSV to display the diff against the existing WBS, then run import after review. Progress and actual data are preserved (read-only on CSV).
syncImport.csvFormatHint: 17-column format (ID + hierarchy + plan + read-only progress columns). Download the CSV from "Export WBS (for overwrite)" first, edit it in Excel, and use it here.
syncImport.removeCandidateBlockedSuffix: (has progress; will be blocked when remove mode = delete)
syncImport.removeModeKeep: Keep: Tasks not in the CSV remain as-is (recommended)
syncImport.removeModeWarn: Warn only: Show remove candidates but do not delete on actual run
syncImport.removeModeDelete: Delete: Logically delete tasks not in the CSV (blocked if any have progress)
syncImport.blockerNotice: Cannot run because of blockers. Please fix the CSV and regenerate the preview.

gantt.noTasksFiltered: No tasks match the selected assignees

project.createDialogDescription: Enter the basic information for the project.
project.tagSeparatorHintSuggestion: (separated by commas or 「、」, recommended for better suggestions)
project.customerEmptyHintPrefix: No customers registered. Please register one in
project.suggestionsModalDescription: We suggest past assets that can be reused for this new project. Adopting them helps prevent avoidable risks (you can also access this later from the Suggestions tab).
project.deleteDialogDescription: This action cannot be undone. For each asset list (Risks / Issues / Retrospectives / Knowledge), only items you check will be permanently deleted. Unchecked items will remain as assets across the All-views.
project.deleteForcedItems: Project itself, overview, estimates, WBS, Gantt, members, related URLs
project.deleteCascadeHeading: Items kept as assets (check to delete from each list)
project.deleteCascadeKnowledge: Knowledge (only solely-linked items are deleted; entries shared with other projects are unlinked but retained)

customer.createDialogDescription: Enter customer information. Only customer name is required.
customer.deleteBlockedTooltip: This customer has linked projects — please use cascade delete on the detail page
customer.deleteDialogDescription: Permanently delete customer "{name}". This action cannot be undone.
customer.deleteCascadeWarningSuffix: active project(s) linked. Deletion will permanently remove the linked project(s), WBS, estimates, members, and attachments
customer.deleteCascadeKnowledge: Also delete Knowledge (entries shared with other projects are only unlinked)
customer.deleteNoCascadeMessage: No active linked projects. Only customer information will be deleted.
customer.relatedProjectsEmpty: No active linked projects for this customer

member.addDialogDescription: Select a user and role to add to the project.

risk.createDescriptionBoth: Please register a risk or issue.
risk.readOnlyHint: Read-only (you are not a project member, so editing is disabled).
risk.subject: Title

syncImport.title: Risk/Issue Sync Import
syncImport.description: Read a CSV, compare with existing risks/issues, and apply after confirmation. Priority is auto-computed by the service layer (not included in CSV).
syncImport.csvFormatHint: 16-column format (ID + all edit-dialog fields). Download a CSV first via "Export (for sync)", edit it in Excel, then import.
syncImport.removeModeKeep: Keep: leave items not in CSV as-is (recommended)
syncImport.removeModeWarn: Warn only: show candidates, do not delete on apply
syncImport.removeModeDelete: Delete: soft-delete items not in CSV (blocked if state != open)
syncImport.blockerNotice: Cannot execute due to blockers. Please fix the CSV and re-preview.

risk.filterRequiredHint: (at least one filter must be applied for bulk edit)
risk.selectAllEditable: Select all editable rows in view
risk.rowNotEditableByOthers: You did not report this item, so it cannot be bulk-edited
risk.bulkUpdateRequireOne: Specify at least one field to update

retro.title: Retrospective

syncImport.title: Retrospective Sync Import
syncImport.description: Read a CSV, compare with existing retrospectives, and apply after confirmation.
syncImport.csvFormatHint: 13-column format (ID + all edit-dialog fields). Download a CSV first via "Export (for sync)", edit it in Excel, then import.
syncImport.removeModeKeep: Keep: leave items not in CSV as-is (recommended)
syncImport.removeModeWarn: Warn only: show candidates, do not delete on apply
syncImport.removeModeDelete: Delete: soft-delete items not in CSV (blocked if state != draft)
syncImport.blockerNotice: Cannot execute due to blockers. Please fix the CSV and re-preview.

retro.readOnlyHint: Read-only (you are not a project member, so editing is disabled).
retro.selectAllOwn: Select all editable retrospectives in view

knowledge.title: Knowledge

syncImport.title: Knowledge Sync Import
syncImport.description: Read a CSV, compare with project-bound knowledge, and apply after confirmation.
syncImport.csvFormatHint: 14-column format (ID + main edit-dialog fields). Tag columns use semicolon separator. Download a CSV first via "Export (for sync)", edit it in Excel, then import.
syncImport.removeModeKeep: Keep: leave items not in CSV as-is (recommended)
syncImport.removeModeWarn: Warn only: show candidates, do not delete on apply
syncImport.removeModeDelete: Delete: soft-delete items not in CSV (blocked if visibility=public)
syncImport.blockerNotice: Cannot execute due to blockers. Please fix the CSV and re-preview.

knowledge.createDescription: Linked to this project. Also reflected automatically in "All Knowledge".
knowledge.readOnlyHint: Read-only (you are not a project member, so editing is disabled).
knowledge.selectAllOwn: Select all editable knowledge in view

memo.createDescription: Default is "Private" (not shared). Choosing "Public" makes the memo visible to other accounts.
memo.detailDescription: Read-only. Editing is available only on the author's memo screen.
memo.selectAllEditable: Select all editable rows in view
memo.empty: No memos yet. Use "New Memo" in the upper right to add one.
memo.emptyPublicHint: (Setting visibility to "Public" on the Memos screen will show it here.)

setting.title: Settings
setting.themeDescription: Change the overall color palette. Your choice is preserved across sign-ins.
setting.i18nDescription: Controls date and time display. When unset (system default), the system-wide default (environment variable or config file) is used. Current system default:
setting.localePreparingHint: * "Coming soon" locales become selectable once translation is complete.
setting.passwordChangeDescription: Enter your current and new passwords.
setting.mfaDescription: Configure two-step verification using an authenticator app (e.g., Google Authenticator).
setting.mfaAdminNote: Administrators must use MFA and cannot disable it from this screen (PR #91).
setting.mfaAdminLockedNote: Administrator accounts have MFA forcibly enabled and cannot disable it on this screen. To change authenticator apps, please ask a system administrator to issue a new account.
setting.mfaScanHint: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app.

users.title: User Management
users.lockInactiveConfirm:
Lock all inactive users who have not signed in for 30+ days.
Admin users are excluded. The accounts themselves remain so author display
for knowledge etc. is preserved, but sign-in is disabled (isActive=false).
To unlock, toggle the active state from each user's edit dialog.
Proceed?
users.lockInactiveDone:
Lock complete

Target users: {count} (updated to isActive=false)
users.createUserDescription: Enter user information. After registration, an invitation email for password setup will be sent.
users.invitationSentBody: A link for setting the password has been sent to {email}. Once the user sets a password from the link, the account will be activated.
users.duplicateEmail: This email address is already registered. Please use a different email address.
users.invitationSendFailed: Failed to send the invitation email. Please verify the email address and try again.
users.registrationFailed: Failed to register. Please try again later.
users.permanentLockTitle: Permanently locked by administrator (only admin can manually unlock)
users.pwFailedBadgeTitle: Login password failure count (5 failures = 30-min temporary lock)
users.mfaFailedBadgeTitle: MFA code failure count (3 failures = 30-min temporary lock)

userEdit.title: Edit User
userEdit.dangerZoneDescription: Deleting the user immediately disables sign-in and removes them from all project memberships. Past activity (assigned tasks, raised risks, etc.) is preserved.
userEdit.deleteConfirm:
Delete "{name}" ({email})?

This will immediately disable sign-in and remove the user from all
project memberships.

Note: Past task assignments, raised risks, and other history are preserved.

stakeholder.title: Stakeholder Register
stakeholder.quadrantManageCloselyDescription: High Influence x High Interest: Engage closely and keep satisfied (regular 1on1, involvement in key decisions)
stakeholder.quadrantKeepSatisfiedDescription: High Influence x Low Interest: Keep satisfied (provide just enough information without over-influencing direction)
stakeholder.quadrantKeepInformedDescription: Low Influence x High Interest: Keep informed (gather field feedback for early issue detection)
stakeholder.quadrantMonitorDescription: Low Influence x Low Interest: Monitor (minimal communication required)
stakeholder.noStakeholders: No stakeholders registered yet. Click "New" in the upper right to add one.
stakeholder.dialogDescription: PMBOK 13 aligned: Record influence / interest / attitude / engagement levels and organize the response strategy.
stakeholder.personalityPlaceholder: e.g. Persuaded by numbers / Prefers documents over discussion / Pre-aligns on Slack before any decision
stakeholder.strategyPlaceholder: e.g. Monthly 30-min 1on1 / Attach KPI summary to monthly report / Pre-align key decisions on Slack

suggestion.coreFeatureDescription: Past knowledge and issues that are similar to this project's tags, purpose, background, and scope are extracted automatically. Adopt them whenever possible to leverage existing assets and reduce avoidable risks.
suggestion.knowledgeNoMatch: No similar knowledge found. Add tags or include more tags to improve suggestion accuracy.
suggestion.pastIssuesDescription: Import resolved issues from past projects as templates. Adopting one clones it as a new issue with state="open" so you can prepare in advance.
suggestion.retrospectivesDescription: Past project retrospectives (problems / next-time items) are shown for reference. Read through them to avoid repeating similar mistakes.

bulkVisibility.filterRequiredHint: (Bulk editing requires at least one filter to be applied)
bulkVisibility.keywordPlaceholder: Text contained in the title / body
bulkVisibility.dialogDescription: Only rows you created will be updated. Rows created by others are excluded automatically on the server side.
